creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Sidenote: I've notified the maintainer of p5-FusionInventory-Task-NetInventory about the review I posted since it will conflict with his port since his part has been integrated into the main agent.

Since both p5-FusionInventory-Task-NetInventory as well as -Task-SNMPQuery would be superseded, they should be expired if this main agent is updated.

-- Mathieu
